CssSelector Component ===================== The CssSelector component converts CSS selectors to XPath expressions. Resources --------- * [Documentation](https://symfony.com/doc/current/components/css_selector.html) * [Contributing](https://symfony.com/doc/current/contributing/index.html) * [Report issues](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/issues) and [send Pull Requests](https://github.com/symfony/symfony/pulls) in the [main Symfony repository](https://github.com/symfony/symfony) Credits ------- This component is a port of the Python cssselect library [v0.7.1](https://github.com/SimonSapin/cssselect/releases/tag/v0.7.1), which is distributed under the BSD license.
